Video.summary: Buckle in tight as drivers go head to head in racing competitions at the Astrodome in Houston, TX during the 2001 season.
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Hang on tight! Monster Jam's 2006 season continues with racing action from Raymond James Stadium, on January 21, 2006.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2013 season races into the Georgia Dome on February 16, 2013.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam trucks take to the track during the January 4-5, 2019 appearance at Vivint Smart Home Arena in Salt Lake City, Utah. Featuring Tyler Menninga in Grave Digger, Elvis Lainez in El Toro Loco, Tanner Root in Monster Mutt, Colton Eichelberger in Max-D, Tony Ochs in Soldier Fortune Black Ops, Myranda Cozad in Scooby-Doo, Austin Minton in Megalodon and Bari Musawwir in Zombie.
Video.title: Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2005 season continues with racing and freestyle action from the HHH Metrodome on December 4, 2004.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Big crowds, loads of fun, and huge air - it's freestyle action Monster Jam style from the Astrodome in Houston, TX!
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue returns to Anaheim as Son Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson looks to continue his historic run in Orange County. Can he win his 7th event championship in three years or will Tyler Menninga break the Anaheim curse that has plagued his otherwise stellar Monster Jam career.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: See who brings home the trophy from California as the Monster Jammers compete at Levi Stadium.
Video.title: Levi Stadium - Santa Clara, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 6 of the Stadium Championship Series, in The Dome at America's Center in St. Louis, MO.
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 4 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Petco Park, in San Diego, CA.
Video.title: Petco Park - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Superdome in New Orleans, LA in the 2000 season.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: Check out all the Monster Jam racing action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 8, 2007!
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Trucks invade Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL, for another star-studded event.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam is back with all the action from Atlanta, GA at the sold-out Georgia Dome on January 12, 2008.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Buckle in for all the awesome racing action from Qualcomm Stadium on January 17, 2009.
Video.title: Qualcomm Stadium - San Diego, CA - Racing

Qualcomm Stadium - San Diego, CA - Racing
Qualcomm Stadium - San Diego, CA - Racing

Video.summary: Only 20 points divide the top 5 as they give their all doing wheelies, racing and freestyle.
Video.title: Everbank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Superstar Sting joins Monster Jam for a wild night at the Metrodome in Minneapolis, MN during Monster Jam's 2001 season!
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Watch exciting Monster Jam freestyle action with backflips, forward momentum poppers, and more!
Video.title: Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation

Image.alt: Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation
Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation
Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation

Video.summary: Catch all the awesome Monster Jam racing action from World Finals XVII on March 18, 2016 at Sam Boyd Stadium.
Video.title: World Finals XVII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals XVII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals XVII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals XVII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season at Everbank Field in Jacksonville, FL featuring Semi Finals race
Video.title: Everbank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central heads to New York as the series points battle continues at UBS Arena in Belmont Park. Scooby Doo’s Brianna Mahon and El Toro Loco’s Fernando Martinez attempt to chip away at the points lead held by Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson. The second-generation Grave Digger driver looks for his series-leading 17th event win.
Video.title: UBS Arena - Belmont Park, NY

Video.summary: In an epic series finale, Arena Championship Series West heads to the Vibrant Arena in Moline, Illinois as Krysten Anderson looks to lead Grave Digger to the Overall Event Championship in one last thrilling showdown with El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez.
Video.title: Vibrant Arena - Moline, IL

Video.summary: Monster Jam storms into the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee for an adrenaline-fueled stop on the Freestyle Media Championship Series. The night features a high-stakes lineup of JCB Racing, the technical Two Wheel Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle competition where drivers have 75 seconds to push their machines to the limit. Rivalries ignite as four-time champion Weston Anderson and 2025 Entertainer of the Year Fernando Martinez battle for dominance, while local heroes like Brandon and Mikayla Tulachka look to claim victory in front of their hometown crowd. From precision nose wheelies to gravity-defying backflips, this episode captures every heart-pounding moment as eight elite teams compete for the overall event title.
Video.title: Fiserv Forum, Milwaukee, WI

Video.summary: Experience the raw power of the Arena Championship Series West as Monster Jam Replay takes over the Golden One Center in Sacramento, California. Round 4 features high-stakes action starting with JCB Racing, where Armando Castro and El Toro Loco battle through the bracket to defeat Carson Williams in Thunderoarus for the racing title. The excitement continues with the Great Clips Skills Challenge, featuring technical maneuvers and two-wheel stunts. The night reaches its peak during Freestyle, where Blake Granger and Monster Mutt Dalmatian deliver a spectacular performance, including a signature backflip, to sweep the competition. After a fierce battle against top competitors like Matt Cody in Grave Digger, Blake Granger is crowned the BKT Overall Event Champion.
Video.title: Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: Cape Town Stadium welcomes Monster Jam to the African continent.
Video.title: Cape Town Stadium - Cape Town, South Africa

Image.alt: Cape Town Stadium - Cape Town, South Africa
Cape Town Stadium - Cape Town, South Africa
Cape Town Stadium - Cape Town, South Africa

Video.summary: Monster Jam Fast Track ignites the night at loneDepot Park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 7 of the Stadium Championship Series East. As the road to the World Finals in Salt Lake City narrows, every point becomes a battleground for the elite drivers of the "Good Vibes Tour". Experience the tactical intensity of JCB Racing, where Cynthia Gauthier looks to settle scores in a first-time seasonal matchup against Megalodon, and the technical mastery of the Skills Challenge, featuring gravity-defying moonwalks and precision donuts. The evening culminates in a chaotic Freestyle segment, where 12,000-pound machines like Mayhem and Sparkle Smash are pushed to their absolute limits, facing mechanical failures and spectacular "big air" moments in pursuit of the Miami crown.
Video.title: loanDepot Park - Miami, FL 1

Video.summary: The roar of 12,000-pound titans descends upon the Paycom Center as Monster Jam Replay heads to Oklahoma City for Round 7 of the Arena Championship Series West. The energy is electric in "Loud City" as elite drivers face off in a high-stakes triple-threat of JCB Racing, the technical Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, and the chaotic brilliance of Freestyle. Witness a tense racing tiebreaker between Carson Williams and Ashley Sanford, and watch as Armando Castro and Tim Hall Jr. battle for critical series points. From Alex Bardin’s vertical precision in EarthShaker to Blake Granger’s powerful pursuit of a "redemption arc" in Monster Mutt Dalmatian, this episode captures the raw power and heart-pounding drama that only Monster Jam can deliver.
Video.title: Paycom Center - Oklahoma City, OK

Video.summary: Monster Jam Replay arrives at the InTrustBank Arena in Wichita, Kansas, for a pivotal Round 8 of the Arena Championship Series West. The stakes are higher than ever as the top two drivers in the series—Blake Granger and Armando Castro—face off in a high-pressure JCB Racing matchup that could shift the season leaderboard. Fans are treated to the technical brilliance of the Two Wheel Skills Challenge, featuring daring combos and gravity-defying maneuvers from the likes of Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Tim Hall Jr. in Jurassic Attack. The evening reaches a fever pitch during the Freestyle segment, where "Daredevil Diva" Angelina Nock takes Megalodon to the skies and Cliff Turner hunts for a breakthrough performance in Velociraptor. Witness the passion and raw power as these elite athletes push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute edge for the Wichita crowd.
Video.title: InTrustBank Arena - Wichita, KS
